articles.author: Mark Anderson, Nectar Gan
articles.title: Xi Promises AI for All in Debut at China’s Top Tech Summit - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: President Xi Jinping hailed China’s progress in developing low-cost artificial intelligence, pressing his personal imprint on the country’s rapidly expanding global influence to call for a more open technological order.
